mapper.select: SELECT * FROM organization_account WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM organization_account WHERE org_user_id = #{orgUserId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE organization_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, must_change_password = #{mustChangePassword}, update_time = now() WHERE org_user_id = #{orgUserId}
UPDATE organization_account SET last_login_time = now(), update_time = now() WHERE org_user_id = #{orgUserId}
